display.purpose: Hero headlines and plan prices. Sora 800, tight. One per view.

body.purpose: All paragraph copy. Inter 400 in Ink Dim, measure 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Badges and live-status chip only. Never a section eyebrow.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Signature interaction: cards/CTAs rise into a violet glow on hover, paired with translateY(-4px).

shadows.name: cta-pulse
shadows.purpose: Pulsing ring on the single highest-intent CTA per page. One maximum.

shadows.name: focus-glow
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus ring on interactive elements.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default ease-out for state transitions and reveals. No bounce.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The action voice. Filled electric plum pill for the primary CTA (checkout, WhatsApp, booking).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: #8224E3; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.0625rem; padding: 1rem 2rem; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease-out, transform 0.2s ease-out, box-shadow 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #6010B5; transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 24px 48px rgba(130,36,227,0.22); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(130,36,227,0.45); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(-1px); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: The lower-priority choice sitting next to a primary CTA. Transparent pill, ink label, hairline that turns plum on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: transparent; color: #F0E8FF; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.0625rem; padding: 1rem 2rem; border: 1px solid #2D0F50; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s ease-out, color 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #8224E3; color: #F7F2FF; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(130,36,227,0.45); }

components.name: Plan Card
components.description: Signature: one of three plan cards. The recommended one carries a plum ring + Recomendado badge; price in Sora display.
components.html:
Recomendado

Pro

$16,000

Sitio completo, listo en 7 dias.
components.css: .ds-plan { display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: #150225; border: 1px solid #2D0F50; border-radius: 1rem; padding: 2rem; color: #F0E8FF; transition: transform 0.2s ease-out, box-shadow 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-plan:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 24px 48px rgba(130,36,227,0.22); } .ds-plan--featured { border-color: #8224E3; } .ds-plan__badge { align-self: flex-start; background: #8224E3; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 9999px; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .ds-plan__name { font-family: Sora, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.5rem; margin: 0 0 0.5rem; } .ds-plan__price { font-family: Sora, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 2.75rem; line-height: 0.93; letter-spacing: -0.03em; margin: 0 0 0.75rem; } .ds-plan__desc { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.0625rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #C4B8E0; margin: 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Brief/contact form field. Surface-2 fill, hairline that becomes plum + glow on focus.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #1C0335; color: #F0E8FF; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.0625rem; padding: 0.875rem 1rem; border: 1px solid #2D0F50; border-radius: 1rem; transition: border-color 0.2s ease-out, box-shadow 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #C4B8E0; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #8224E3; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(130,36,227,0.45); }

components.name: Live Status Chip
components.description: Honest urgency: the cupos/availability chip. Pulsing plum dot + ghost pill, label style.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid #2D0F50; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #C4B8E0; } .ds-chip__dot { width: 0.5rem; height: 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: #8224E3; box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(130,36,227,0.45); animation: ds-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%,100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(130,36,227,0.45); } 50% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px rgba(130,36,227,0); } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-chip__dot { animation: none; } }

narrative.overview: A workshop, not a factory. The interface is a deep-plum dark room where a single craftsperson works in the open - prices, process, and the person behind the work all visible at once. Electric violet is the tool in the maker's hand: it appears exactly where action happens (the CTA, the recommended plan, the live status dot) and nowhere else. The system sells cheap as smart value by out-crafting the category, never by looking cheap. Where the legacy site reached for decorative gradient text and glassmorphism on every surface, this system sharpens: same plum identity, but those tricks are retired. Trust and speed are the aesthetic.
keyCharacteristics: Plum-black canvas (#0D0118), violet-tinted white ink - never pure white on black.
One accent, the electric purple, reserved for action and hierarchy.
Sora extrabold display set tight; Inter body set generous and readable.
Pill CTAs, soft 1rem cards, glow used as feedback not decoration.
Mobile-first, fast: motion is purposeful, performance is a conversion feature.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Electric Plum (#8224E3) appears on <=10% of any screen - the primary CTA, the recommended plan, an active state. If two purple things compete for click me, one is wrong.

rules.name: The No-Pure-White Rule
rules.body: Text on plum-black is always Ink (#F0E8FF) or Ink Dim (#C4B8E0), never #FFFFFF. The only #FFFFFF in the system is the label inside a filled purple button.

rules.name: The Sora-Heading / Inter-Body Rule
rules.body: Sora is for headings, prices, and numbers only - never body copy. Inter is for everything readable.

rules.name: The No-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: No tiny tracked uppercase kicker stacked above section headings. The Label style is for badges and status, not section scaffolding.

rules.name: The Tonal-Depth Rule
rules.body: To raise an element, step up the plum ramp before reaching for a shadow. Shadow is violet and earned by interaction - never a static decorative grey.

dos: Do keep the canvas Plum Black (#0D0118) and reserve Electric Plum (#8224E3) for action - the One Voice Rule.
Do set body copy in Ink Dim (#C4B8E0); it clears 4.5:1. Use Ink (#F0E8FF) for headings.
Do pair Sora (headings/prices) with Inter (body) on the contrast axis. Never two near-identical sans.
Do lift surfaces by stepping the plum tonal ramp first; use the violet Hover Lift glow only for interactivity.
Do keep one pulsing CTA per page and one bordered recomendado plan - singular emphasis converts.
Do ship prefers-reduced-motion fallbacks for the marquee, aurora, pulse, and hover lift.
Do test every heading at 360px / 768px / 1280px - Sora extrabold + long MX words overflow narrow grids.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text on a gradient). The legacy .text-gradient-purple is retired.
Don't default to glassmorphism. The legacy .glass-card blur-on-everything is retired; use solid Surface tones.
Don't set Muted Plum (#7A6896) as small body text - it's 4.11:1, large/bold only. Never #FFFFFF text on plum-black.
Don't build the generic SaaS landing: no hero-metric template, no identical card grids, no tracked uppercase eyebrow over every section.
Don't look cheap or spammy: no clip-art, no loud strikethrough-discount energy. Cheap is carried by craft.
Don't look like a corporate agency: no stock-photo teams, no we deliver solutions. The founder is visible and named.
Don't over-design: no framer/ogl animation maximalism that hurts mobile load. Static copy ships zero JS.
Don't use a colored border-left/border-right stripe as a card accent - use a full 1px border or the plum tonal step.
